ClickPlayJS

Color Changing Button

Click the button below to see it change colors dynamically. The button cycles through a series of vibrant colors while maintaining a sleek, modern aesthetic.

Time-Based Greeting

This button triggers an alert with a customized greeting message based on the current time of day. Whether it's morning, afternoon, evening, or night, you'll get an appropriate greeting.

Basic Calculator

Enter two numbers below and click calculate to perform addition. The form includes input validation and displays a clean, readable result.
